business.name: Dorasani
business.tagline: South Indian tiffin, made fresh daily.
business.oneLiner: Crisp dosas, soft idlis, and everything in between — real South Indian tiffin, made fresh every morning.

services.title: Dosa varieties

services.title: Idli & vada

services.title: Takeaway & delivery
services.blurb: Your tiffin favourites, ready to go.
